hero.lede: I build fast, thoughtful websites and shops — from first sketch to deployment. End-to-end, with an AI-assisted workflow that turns weeks into days.

about.title: One developer. One contact. The full stack.
about.intro: Hi, I'm André. For eight years I've been building websites and shops — as Senior Frontend Engineer at Germany's largest e-commerce platform by day, and as a freelancer for companies that want a reliable partner.
about.para2: No agency pipeline, no middle layer. Design, frontend, backend, SEO, hosting — I do it all myself. Which means shorter loops, transparent communication, and decisions that actually fit the project.
about.para3: I work AI-assisted. Not as a gimmick, but because it lets me ship with the care of a team in the time of one person.

steps.label: Design in browser
steps.desc: No Figma middle layer. Straight to code.

steps.label: SEO & performance
steps.desc: Core Web Vitals green, structured delivery.

services.title: What I do.
services.intro: From landing page to complex webshop — a complete offering, no handoffs to third parties.

items.title: Frontend development
items.desc: Vue 3, Nuxt, TypeScript. Accessible, fast, maintainable.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.desc: Node, Laravel, PHP. Custom solutions over toolkit compromises.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Shopify, WooCommerce, custom plugins. From small to scaled.

items.title: WordPress & Elementor
items.desc: Custom themes, ACF, custom blocks. No off-the-shelf templates.

items.title: SEO & analytics
items.desc: Technical SEO, structured data, content architecture.

items.title: Performance
items.desc: Audit and optimization. Sub-second load is not a coincidence.

work.title: Selected projects.
work.intro: A handful from recent years. Confidentiality honored on request — more references available.

items.title: A craft tradition that finally fits online.
items.desc: Full relaunch for a mid-sized furniture manufacturer in Franconia. New information architecture, editorial CMS, catalog of 200+ products. Organic traffic +186% in six months.

items.title: Regional brewery, direct-to-consumer.
items.desc: WooCommerce shop with vintage catalog, subscription flow, and regional delivery checker.

items.title: Law firm with client portal.
items.desc: Formal presence with a human touch. Client portal, GDPR-compliant, accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA).

pricing.title: Priced up front.
pricing.intro: Fixed starting prices per project type. Individual scope adjusted after a shared discovery call.

tiers.name: Landing
tiers.desc: Single page for campaigns, launches, or solo founders.

tiers.name: Website
tiers.desc: Full company website with editorial CMS.

tiers.name: Webshop
tiers.desc: Shop on WooCommerce, Shopify or custom — integrations included.
features: Up to 50 products migrated / set up

pricing.note: Hourly rate for maintenance, small tasks or retainer:

contact.title: Let's work together.
contact.lede: Got a project in mind? Tell me about it — a no-strings call is the fastest way to see if we're a fit.

form.name: Name
form.messagePh: A sentence or two — timing, existing materials, anything helpful.
form.note: Reply within 24 hours on business days.
form.success: Thanks! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.successSub: Meanwhile — feel free to browse the work.

footer.tagline: Frontend Engineer & fullstack web developer. Made in Berlin.
